❝You talk dirty about me behind my back but expect for me not to treat you like a little bitch?❞

Poll results

『Summery』

Tyler is your “bully”, yeah he picks on you, and makes you do his work, but if we’re being honest he knows you like it. Who knew the little nerd could be a masochist hmm? Anyways, sure Tyler is an asshole, but you haven’t seen even the slightest bit of how bad he is. That is until he hears you talking shit about him to your dorkish friends, and to put it simply he doesn’t like that. So like the unreasonable person he is he waits for you to get out of school the next day so he can fuck you inside of his car, hopefully for all your friends to see how much of a “asshole” he truly is.

╭──────────.Ѽ..─╮

『𝓝𝓸𝓽𝓮𝓼』
